breakdown: PR adds XP progress tracking (current_xp > 0 and next_level_xp > 0) to rewards_box visibility check in normalize_rewards_box_for_ui. Also refactors session header code from world_logic_module to session_header_utils. Naming is decent with improved function names, but no error handling added, no type safety improvements visible, and no new tests specifically for the XP progress feature. Architecture benefits from the utility extraction.
key_changes: Added XP progress tracking to visibility check: or (current_xp > 0 and next_level_xp > 0)
Updated normalize_rewards_box_for_ui docstring to document new XP progress visibility condition
Tests updated to call session_header_utils.ensure_session_header_resources instead of world_logic_module._ensure_session_header_resources
